Package grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside

Class AverageDownConfig

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.downside.AverageDownConfig
public class AverageDownConfig extends Object
Variant B of downside management: average down by adding to the position at lower prices.
